title: Verify informational message about FM radio unavailability
test_steps: Open the NextRadio app. | Navigate to the screen displaying the informational message about FM radio unavailability.
expected_result: The screen should display the NextRadio logo at the top. | The title should read 'FM Radio is Unavailable' with a sad face emoji. | The subtitle should explain the reason for the unavailability and mention a contest. | A prominent blue button labeled 'ENTER TO WIN $10,000!' should be present at the bottom.

title: Check if the button is clickable
test_steps: Open the NextRadio app. | Navigate to the screen displaying the informational message about FM radio unavailability. | Click on the 'ENTER TO WIN $10,000!' button.
expected_result: The button should respond to the click action.

title: Verify if the screen is accessible
test_steps: Open the NextRadio app. | Navigate to the screen displaying the informational message about FM radio unavailability. | Perform accessibility checks on the screen.
expected_result: The screen should be accessible and meet accessibility standards.

title: Check if the screen is usable
test_steps: Open the NextRadio app. | Navigate to the screen displaying the informational message about FM radio unavailability. | Perform usability checks on the screen.
expected_result: The screen should be user-friendly and easy to understand.

title: Verify data persistence
test_steps: Open the NextRadio app. | Navigate to the screen displaying the informational message about FM radio unavailability. | Close the app and reopen it. | Verify that the informational message is still displayed.
expected_result: The informational message should persist after the app is closed and reopened.
